title: New Year Resolutions | #shorts
full_text: Mom it's January 2nd and I really think we should go to the gym today no why would we go to the gym you told me one of your resolutions was to work out more I do I do but I'm working my way to the working out okay but the first you said that you had to get a massage right I did and you know I needed it today you have not I said after I get the massage let's see how the weather shapes out cuz yesterday was so the gym is indoors okay everything so technical with you this body was designed to live near the equator in the Sun you live in New York you CH to live in New York you have the your vitamin D deficiency is so bad that the doctor keeps telling me to go get more Vitamin D supplements for you that you throw away immediately your dad forced me to come and live here in this Arctic T Tundra arctic tundra not only of temperature but also of human emotions because look how my kids are talking to me
